evidence.consoleErrors: React errors in TitleBar and App components

assertions.issues: BLOCKER: Same as VAL-FILE-001 - window.electronAPI is undefined

blockers.description: window.electronAPI is undefined in renderer process. The preload script at dist-electron/main/main.js is not properly exposing the electronAPI to the window object via contextBridge. When the renderer tries to call window.electronAPI methods (isMaximized, onMaximizeChange, etc.), it throws errors, causing React error boundaries to catch errors in TitleBar and App components, leaving the app with an empty #root div.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded the page multiple times, connected via different CDP methods (agent-browser connect 9222, agent-browser --auto-connect). The issue persists - window.electronAPI remains undefined.

summary: Tested 8 assertions (VAL-FILE-001 through VAL-FILE-008): All blocked due to critical app failure. The Electron app is running with CDP debugging enabled on port 9222, but window.electronAPI is undefined in the renderer process, preventing the React app from mounting properly. The preload script does not appear to be properly exposing the electronAPI object to the renderer via contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('electronAPI', electronAPI).
